title.en: It's a pity that the stay is too short.

content.en:
"It's out!"

Ye Tian was a little reluctant to create the Extreme Gold Mountain, after all, the cultivation environment in the Extreme Gold List was indeed good, and he also gave a large amount of resources and materials for free.

It's a pity that the stay is too short.

However, if he stayed for a long time, the resources of the Extreme Gold Mountain would have been exhausted long ago, and it would not be his turn.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian returned to the Wudao Tower.

At this time, the Lord of Time came to find Ye Tian.

"I've seen the Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Lord of Time approvingly: "Ye Tian, you are very good, you have actually broken into the top ten of the Extreme Gold List. "

"It's just luck!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

Immediately, the Lord of Time got down to business.

"Ye Tian, due to your excellent performance, this time the Wudao Tower is going to focus on cultivating you, and now there is a big opportunity. The Lord of Time said, "You can enter the super-perfect treasure of the Daoless Tower and comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao. "

"What, the power of the Ultimate Path!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It was a surprise that he had received such treatment.

As far as he knew, even the many perfect controllers in the Daoless Pagoda didn't have the opportunity to comprehend the extreme power of the Perfect Treasure!

Then.

With a wave of the Lord of Time, the phantom of six perfect treasures descended.

"We have a total of six super-perfect treasures in the Daoless Tower!"

The Lord of Time.

"Six !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He also thought that the Wudao Tower was just a super-perfect treasure, that is, the super-perfect treasure of the Wudao Tower, but he didn't expect that there were six super-perfect treasures.

It is worthy of being the top force in the Eternal Ruins, and the foundation is strong.

At this time, the Lord of Time introduced: "These six super-level perfect treasures are the Void Tower, which contains the power of the five Poles of Defense, Space, Time, Town, and Void. Of course, it is not better to have a large number of extreme paths, although some super-perfect treasures only contain a kind of extreme power, but they are more pure, and the effect of contemplation is better; the second super-perfect treasure is the empty sea pearl, which contains the extreme path of water and space; the third super-perfect treasure is a quicksand stone statue, which contains the extreme path of earth and the extreme path of gravity, The fourth super-perfect treasure is the mirror of arcane causes, which contains the extreme path of cause and effect, the fifth super-perfect treasure is the blood lin spear, which contains the extreme path of the gun, and the sixth super-perfect treasure is the crystalless mountain, which contains the extreme path of time and space. You can choose any of these six super-perfect treasures and enter them to practice the power of the ultimate path. "

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, there was no doubt that the six super-grade perfect treasures were all very powerful, and many of them contained several extreme powers.

And the most powerful should be the Daoless Tower, but the Daoless Tower itself contains the power of the five Extreme Dao, and the power of a single Extreme Dao is not necessarily stronger than the Extreme Dao power contained in other super-perfect treasures.

However, Ye Tian finally decided to enter the Wudao Tower.

The main thing is that he has two replica bodies, and these two replica bodies can also comprehend other extreme path powers in the Wudao Pagoda through the air, although the effect of enlightenment is not very good, but it is also an opportunity.

Therefore, he can comprehend several extreme powers at the same time, as long as he enters the door.

So, Ye Tian said: "Lord of Time, I want to enter the super perfect treasure of the Daoless Tower to comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao. "

"Yes!"

The Lord of Time answered.

Immediately, the Lord of Time took Ye Tian to the Wudao Pagoda itself.

In fact, Ye Tian had also been here many times, but the power of the Wudao Tower was restrained, and he couldn't comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao.

However, a special piece of the Void Path Pagoda has opened up inside, and the power of the Extreme Path is vented inside, allowing the cultivators who enter it to comprehend the power of the five Extreme Paths.

"Enter it, and you can contemplate three million eternal years in it. Remember, take advantage of this opportunity and try to master a kind of extreme fur!"

The Lord of Time said.

"Thank you, Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian immediately entered the inner area of the Daoless Tower.

Airplanes!!!!

The power of the five extreme paths spread all over this area, and after Ye Tian entered here, it was almost impossible to move an inch.

However, the power here is very gentle, not as violent as the perfect treasure of the Nine Rivers Void.

"The super perfect treasure of the Nine Rivers Void has not yet been successfully conceived, no one controls it, the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword is very violent, but the Wudao Tower has a master, the power here is mild, and it will not contain lethality, but it does not reach the strength of the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, and it cannot stay here. Ye Tian said darkly.

However, no matter what the power here is, the effect of comprehension is not as good as that of the Nine Rivers Void.

In short, there are gains and losses.

"You can only comprehend the three million eternal years here, so seize the opportunity to quickly comprehend!"

Ye Tian began to practice here.

This time, what he wants to comprehend is the Space Pole Dao, the Time Pole Dao and the Void Pole Dao, these three Extreme Dao are very good for fighting and improving strength.

Time passed slowly, and the thirty-three billion changes of Ye Tian's Perfect Space Dao were constantly merging, from three and three billion changes to twenty-one changes, and then to one billion changes.

The Dao of Space has been fused to a billion variations, which is equivalent to mastering the skin of the Dao of Space.

And to do this, Ye Tian only spent 600,000 eternal years.

"Although the effect of the comprehension here is not very good, I have mastered the prototype of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, and I am quite familiar with the power of the Extreme Dao, and there are common principles between the Extreme Dao, so I will comprehend the power of the Extreme Dao of the Space, and my understanding will be very deep, and it will not be as difficult as the first time I participated in the Extreme Dao of the Sword. Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, the progress of the Time Pole Dao and the Void Pole Dao was slow, after all, this was a remote enlightenment, and the effect was much reduced.

Before you know it, another million eternal years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had already fused the changes of the Dao of Space to less than 100 million kinds, mastered the power of the prototype of the Spatial Extreme Dao, and the Time Extreme Dao and the Void Extreme Dao had also mastered the rudimentary form.

"There are still more than a million eternal years left, and I can probably fuse the Spatial Extreme Dao Prototype to the extent of millions of variations. At the same time, the prototype of the Time Pole Dao and the prototype of the Void Pole Dao are condensed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And in the years that followed, he worked hard for this goal.

Finally, before the end of the three million eternal years, Ye Tian mastered the power of the Temporal Extreme Dao Prototype and the Void Extreme Dao Prototype, and the Space Extreme Dao Prototype was fused to the extent of more than six million changes.

Up to now, Ye Tian has fully mastered the power of the four extreme path prototypes, and his strength can be said to have skyrocketed.
